title: Nura Dev - Voice for AI Coding App - App Store
excerpt: Download Nura Dev - Voice for AI Coding by Simon Rajasingh on the App Store. See screenshots, ratings and reviews, user tips, and more apps like Nura Dev -…
content_html:
Push-to-talk coding companion

Free · In‑App Purchases · Designed for iPad. Not verified for macOS.

Nura Dev turns your iPhone into a voice remote for terminal-based AI coding agents. Pair your CLI in seconds, hold the mic button to speak your prompt, and read the agent's reply on your phone. Stay in the loop wherever you are — kitchen, car, walk, bed — without losing your place in a long-running coding session. WHAT YOU CAN DO • Hold-to-talk voice control — speak naturally, no wake word • Replies in real time — every agent response streamed to your phone as text • Real-time activity feed — see tool calls, file edits, and commands as the agent works • Approve tool calls from your phone — keep dangerous actions safe even when you're away from the keyboard • Persistent chat history — pick up where you left off when you reopen the app • Multi-session support — one app, all your paired coding agent sessions HOW IT WORKS 1. Run your coding agent CLI in your terminal with the Nura plugin installed 2. Scan the pairing QR code from the app 3. Hold the mic, talk, release 4. Read the agent's reply, or tap a tool-call card to approve or deny REQUIRES • A compatible terminal-based AI coding agent and any required subscription • iOS 18 or later • A Google or Apple account for sign-in • A working network connection to your paired terminal session PRIVACY Voice audio is transcribed through Nura's relay and not stored. Your code and conversations stay between your terminal and your iPhone. See nuradev.app/privacy.html for full details. SUBSCRIPTION Nura Dev requires a $4.99/month subscription after a 7-day free trial. Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage or cancel in Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions. Any unused portion of a free trial is forfeited when you purchase a subscription. Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/ Privacy Policy: https://nuradev.app/privacy.html

Ratings & Reviews

  • This app hasn’t received enough ratings or reviews to display an overview.

• A fresh new app icon and refreshed branding. • You can now select and copy text directly from replies — grab a command, path, or snippet in a single tap. • Cleaner, more readable chat typography for longer replies. • Performance improvements and bug fixes.

Version 1.10 Jul 15

sentences.en: Nura Dev turns your iPhone into a voice remote for terminal-based AI coding agents.
sentences.zh: Nura Dev 将您的 iPhone 变成基于终端的 AI 编码代理的语音遥控器。

sentences.en: Pair your CLI in seconds, hold the mic button to speak your prompt, and read the agent's reply on your phone.
sentences.zh: 只需几秒钟即可配对 CLI，按住麦克风按钮说出提示，然后在手机上阅读客服人员的回复。

sentences.en: Stay in the loop wherever you are — kitchen, car, walk, bed — without losing your place in a long-running coding session.
sentences.zh: 无论您身在何处（厨房、汽车、步行、床上），都可以随时了解最新情况，而不会在长时间运行的编码会话中迷失自己的位置。

sentences.en: WHAT YOU CAN DO • Hold-to-talk voice control — speak naturally, no wake word • Replies in real time — every agent response streamed to your phone as text • Real-time activity feed — see tool calls, file edits, and commands as the agent works • Approve tool calls from your phone — keep dangerous actions safe even when you're away from the keyboard • Persistent chat history — pick up where you left off when you reopen the app • Multi-session support — one app, all your paired coding agent sessions HOW IT WORKS 1.
sentences.zh: 您可以做什么 • 保持通话语音控制 — 自然说话，无需唤醒词 • 实时回复 — 每个代理响应都以文本形式传输到您的手机 • 实时活动源 — 在代理工作时查看工具调用、文件编辑和命令 • 批准来自手机的工具调用 — 即使您远离键盘，也能确保危险操作的安全 • 持久聊天记录 — 重新打开应用程序时从上次中断的地方继续 • 多会话支持 — 一个应用程序，所有配对的编码代理会话工作原理 1.

sentences.en: Run your coding agent CLI in your terminal with the Nura plugin installed 2.
sentences.zh: 在安装了 Nura 插件的终端中运行编码代理 CLI 2.

sentences.en: Scan the pairing QR code from the app 3.
sentences.zh: 3. 从应用程序中扫描配对二维码。
握住麦克风，讲话，松开 4.

sentences.en: Read the agent's reply, or tap a tool-call card to approve or deny REQUIRES • A compatible terminal-based AI coding agent and any required subscription • iOS 18 or later • A Google or Apple account for sign-in • A working network connection to your paired terminal session PRIVACY Voice audio is transcribed through Nura's relay and not stored.
sentences.zh: 阅读代理的回复，或点击工具调用卡以批准或拒绝 要求 • 兼容的基于终端的 AI 编码代理和任何所需的订阅 • iOS 18 或更高版本 • 用于登录的 Google 或 Apple 帐户 • 与配对终端会话的工作网络连接 隐私 语音音频通过 Nura 中继转录，而不是存储。

sentences.en: Your code and conversations stay between your terminal and your iPhone.
sentences.zh: 您的代码和对话保留在您的终端和 iPhone 之间。
有关完整详细信息，请参阅 nuradev.app/privacy.html。

content_html_zh:
一键通编码伴侣

免费 · 应用内购买 · 专为 iPad 设计。 未针对 macOS 进行验证。

Nura Dev 将您的 iPhone 变成基于终端的 AI 编码代理的语音遥控器。 只需几秒钟即可配对 CLI，按住麦克风按钮说出提示，然后在手机上阅读客服人员的回复。 无论您身在何处（厨房、汽车、步行、床上），都可以随时了解最新情况，而不会在长时间运行的编码会话中迷失自己的位置。 您可以做什么 • 保持通话语音控制 — 自然说话，无需唤醒词 • 实时回复 — 每个代理响应都以文本形式传输到您的手机 • 实时活动源 — 在代理工作时查看工具调用、文件编辑和命令 • 批准来自手机的工具调用 — 即使您远离键盘，也能确保危险操作的安全 • 持久聊天记录 — 重新打开应用程序时从上次中断的地方继续 • 多会话支持 — 一个应用程序，所有配对的编码代理会话工作原理 1. 在安装了 Nura 插件的终端中运行编码代理 CLI 2. 3. 从应用程序中扫描配对二维码。 握住麦克风，讲话，松开 4. 阅读代理的回复，或点击工具调用卡以批准或拒绝 要求 • 兼容的基于终端的 AI 编码代理和任何所需的订阅 • iOS 18 或更高版本 • 用于登录的 Google 或 Apple 帐户 • 与配对终端会话的工作网络连接 隐私 语音音频通过 Nura 中继转录，而不是存储。 您的代码和对话保留在您的终端和 iPhone 之间。 有关完整详细信息，请参阅 nuradev.app/privacy.html。 订阅 Nura Dev 需要 7 天免费试用后每月支付 4.99 美元的订阅费。 除非在当前订阅期结束前至少 24 小时取消，否则订阅将自动续订。 在“设置”→“Apple ID”→“订阅”中管理或取消。 当您购买订阅时，免费试用的任何未使用部分将被没收。 使用条款：https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/ 隐私政策：https://nuradev.app/privacy.html

评级与评论

  • 此应用程序尚未获得足够的评分或评论来显示概述。

• 全新的应用程序图标和更新的品牌。 • 您现在可以直接从回复中选择和复制文本 — 只需轻按一下即可抓取命令、路径或片段。 • 更简洁、更易读的聊天排版，可提供更长的回复。 • 性能改进和错误修复。

1.10 版本 2015 年 7 月

  • 与您相关的数据 可能会收集以下数据并将其与您的身份相关联： 联系信息 用户内容标识符
